metadata.source: Relationship to FUTURE-AI and Recent Governance Literature section, Paper1_Manuscript.docx
metadata.description: Mapping of FUTURE-AI consensus guideline principles to governance gate domains
metadata.note: This is the author's interpretive mapping. The gate architecture does not compete with FUTURE-AI; it provides the decision-theoretic layer that converts FUTURE-AI evidence into an institutional deployment decision.

mappings.alignment_note: Fairness aligns with equity oversight requirements
Universality spans multiple gate domains as a general design principle
Usability aligns with safety validation and accountability structures
Explainability aligns with documentation and transparency requirements
